steps.title: Simplify and identify the contradiction
steps.content:
The equation $2x + 5 = 2x$ has $2x$ on both sides. Subtract $2x$ from both sides:

$$2x + 5 - 2x = 2x - 2x$$
$$5 = 0$$

This is a contradiction — a false statement that can never be true. Therefore, there are zero solutions. That matches choice A — A is correct.
